issues.title: Damage spike: enemy dealt 31 dmg (107% of 29 HP) on floor 1
issues.description: At turn seq 133 (floor 1, encounter 2, turn 22), the enemy dealt 31 damage when the player had 29 HP. This is 107% of the player's current HP, exceeding the 50% spike threshold.

evidence.metric: Enemy dealt 31 damage (107% of player's 29 HP)

issues.title: Player defeated on floor 1, encounter 2 (stone_sentinel) — struggling profile
issues.description: The struggling player was defeated by stone_sentinel (mini_boss) on floor 1, encounter 2 after 22 turns. They dealt 24 damage but took 93. Accuracy was 33.8%. Dying on floor 1 is extremely punishing for retention.

evidence.metric: Defeated on floor 1 by stone_sentinel (93 damage taken)

issues.suggestedFix: Reduce floor 1 enemy damage or HP, or add canary difficulty reduction for struggling players

issues.title: Unfun moment: HP dropped from 71 to 0 in single encounter (floor 1, stone_sentinel)
issues.description: During encounter 2 on floor 1 against stone_sentinel (mini_boss), the player's HP plummeted from 71 (89%) to 0 (0%). This 71 HP loss in a single encounter feels punishing and demoralizing, especially for struggling players.
issues.suggestedFix: Cap maximum damage per encounter or add a "mercy" mechanic that reduces damage after a severe hit
